title: Recipe visibility read hardening
summary: private, deleted and quarantined-owner recipe/tag existence를 public read matrix에서 차단하고, generation-aware managed image registry와 ordered cleanup을 F0 lifecycle에 결합한다.
goal: public recipe/tag/cache/SEO와 managed image lifecycle이 parent recipe visibility와 session-bound account generation보다 넓어지지 않게 하면서 기존 pinned history와 owner-neutral public content를 보존한다.

owners.claude: forbidden by explicit user instruction; do not invoke Claude for authoring, repair, implementation, review, security, DB, design, operations, or closeout
owners.codex: separate sessions for Stage 1 author, internal 1.5 reviewer/repair-final, backend/data/storage implementation, security/DB review, five-axis review, existing-consumer implementation/review, and final closeout; no session approves its own work

dependencies: account-session-generation-foundation Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1073; runtime implementation is a Stage 2 predecessor
product-ingredient-link-foundation Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1076
runtime activation requires F0 plus this slice joint cutover readiness; this does not block the approved Stage 0 docs sequence

external_smokes: node scripts/verify-recipe-visibility-read-hardening-remote.mjs --mode post-merge-read-only from merged exact SHA only
deployed public list detail themes tags sitemap and cache non-disclosure smoke
remote RLS grant function trigger bucket policy and exact principal inventory
approved fixture Storage replay for upload takeover cancel attach first-404 late-object and compensation
legacy orphan inventory report proves enqueue and delete zero
Manual Only launchd install secret host power login sleep and external heartbeat evidence
production generation cutover database and storage writes remain zero until approved joint activation

required_checks: pnpm exec vitest run tests/recipe-visibility-read-hardening.test.ts tests/recipe-visibility-routes.test.ts tests/recipe-visibility-security.test.ts tests/recipe-image-registry.test.ts tests/recipe-image-lifecycle.test.ts tests/recipe-visibility-account-delete.test.ts
verify_commands: pnpm exec vitest run tests/workflow-v2-docs.test.ts tests/omo-automation-spec.test.ts tests/omo-bookkeeping.test.ts tests/omo-doc-gate.test.ts tests/source-of-truth-sync.test.ts
evaluator_commands: separate Codex internal 1.5 review of all five Stage 1 core artifacts plus roadmap and status projections
separate Codex security and DB review of public read matrix RLS grants lifecycle image CAS outbox quarantine and owner-neutral preservation
separate Codex Stage 3 implementation review and final closeout review

out_of_scope: RECIPE_DETAIL fork editor delete CTA or layout owned by successor #5
Content snapshot Meal authority personal write and propagation owned by successors #4 #6 and #7
Recipe-book object picker UI or in-progress MYPAGE and RECIPEBOOK_DETAIL files
Legacy orphan deletion or deletion manifest approval
Arbitrary external URL conversion to managed object
Vercel Cron as P0 scheduler or claimed 24 by 7 availability
User-facing history trash restore or a new public restore endpoint
Unmerged remote migration production database or Storage writes
notes: Stage 2 backend implementation is in progress on feature/be-recipe-visibility-read-hardening after F0 and the merged recipe media/tag predecessors. Approval remains not_started until fresh separate Codex internal 1.5, security/DB and five-axis reviewers approve the frozen implementation tree with zero required findings. Public recipe/tag readers and the isolated PostgreSQL fresh/replay gate are the current small backend PR executable subset. verification.required_checks intentionally remains the full-slice closeout contract and is not a claim that deferred image registry/lifecycle, Storage replay, scheduler, existing-consumer, Playwright, exploratory QA or merged-exact-SHA remote verifier artifacts exist in this PR; those remain later owning-stage gates. Stage 4 changes only existing MANUAL_RECIPE_CREATE behavior/states and adds no visual hierarchy. Joint generation/account-delete activation remains off until F0 and this slice pass the complete release gate.
